initial_candidates.sql:
WITH player_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_id,
        p.country_name,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT pm.match_id) AS runs_per_match
    FROM player p
    JOIN player_match pm ON p.player_id = pm.player_id
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pm.match_id = bs.match_id
    GROUP BY p.player_id, p.country_name
)
SELECT 
    country_name,
    AVG(runs_per_match) AS avg_country_runs
FROM player_avg
GROUP BY country_name
ORDER BY avg_country_runs DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH player_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_id,
        p.country_name,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT pm.match_id) AS runs_per_match
    FROM player p
    JOIN player_match pm ON p.player_id = pm.player_id
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pm.match_id = bs.match_id AND pm.player_id = bs.match_id
    GROUP BY p.player_id, p.country_name
)
SELECT 
    country_name,
    AVG(runs_per_match) AS avg_country_runs
FROM player_avg
GROUP BY country_name
ORDER BY avg_country_runs DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH player_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_id,
        p.country_name,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT pm.match_id) AS runs_per_match
    FROM player p
    JOIN player_match pm ON p.player_id = pm.player_id
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pm.match_id = bs.match_id AND pm.player_id = (
        SELECT striker FROM ball_by_ball b 
        WHERE b.match_id = bs.match_id 
          AND b.over_id = bs.over_id 
          AND b.ball_id = bs.ball_id 
          AND b.innings_no = bs.innings_no
        LIMIT 1
    )
    GROUP BY p.player_id, p.country_name
)
SELECT 
    country_name,
    AVG(runs_per_match) AS avg_country_runs
FROM player_avg
GROUP BY country_name
ORDER BY avg_country_runs DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH player_avg AS (
  SELECT 
    p.player_id,
    p.country_name,
    SUM(bs.runs_scored) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT pm.match_id) AS runs_per_match
  FROM player p
  JOIN player_match pm ON p.player_id = pm.player_id
  JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pm.match_id = bs.match_id AND pm.player_id = bs.match_id
  GROUP BY p.player_id, p.country_name
)
SELECT 
  country_name,
  AVG(runs_per_match) AS avg_country_runs
FROM player_avg
GROUP BY country_name
ORDER BY avg_country_runs DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH player_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_id,
        p.country_name,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT pm.match_id) AS runs_per_match
    FROM player p
    JOIN player_match pm ON p.player_id = pm.player_id
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pm.match_id = bs.match_id AND pm.player_id = bs.match_id
    GROUP BY p.player_id, p.country_name
)
SELECT 
    country_name,
    AVG(runs_per_match) AS avg_country_runs
FROM player_avg
GROUP BY country_name
ORDER BY avg_country_runs DESC
LIMIT 5;
